Name: Precision NeuroImaging and Connectomics (PNC)
Description: Structural MP2RAGE images were denoised and deidentified for data sharing. MP2RAGE denoising was applied using mp2rage_denoise.py from micapipe v0.2.3 and defacing with micapipe_de-identify from micapipe v1.0.0.
Acknowledgements: The authors thank all participants who took part in this study. We also thank David Costa, Ronald Lopez and Soheil M. Quchani for their assistance in data collection, as well as Michael Ferreira for their guidance in designing the scanning protocol.
HowToAcknowledge: Please cite the dataset: Cabalo, D.G., Leppert, I.R., Thevakumaran, R. et al. Multimodal precision MRI of the individual human brain at ultra-high fields. Sci Data 12, 526 (2025). https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-025-04863-7
